cards.rules_text: Whenever Lancer crews a Vehicle, until end of turn that Vehicle gains “Whenever this Vehicle deals combat damage to a player, you may sacrifice it. If you do, it deals damage equal to its mana value to any target.”

As Thrash Machine enters, choose up to six ★ ️worth of modes . You may choose the same mode more than once.
★ – Thrash Machine enters with a +1/+1 counter.
★★ – Thrash Machine enters with your choice of a trample, vigilance or haste counter.

Whenever you cast an enchantment spell, choose one that hasn't been chosen this turn. Create a creature token with those characteristics.
• 3/1 red Hero with trample.
• 2/2 blue Hero with vigilance.
• 1/1 green Hero with lifelink.
{3}{G}{G}: Put a +1/+1 counter on each Hero you control.

At the beginning of combat on your turn, you may have target artifact or enchantment you control become a Spirit creature with base power and toughness equal to Mad Mew Mew's until end of turn. If you do, Mad Mew Mew becomes an artifact and loses all other types until end of turn.
At the beginning of your upkeep, target opponent faces a villainous choice – They draw a card and you create two treasure tokens, or they create a treasure token and you draw two cards.

cards.rules_text:
Whenever one or more creatures you control attack, create a Food token.
As long you control three or more Foods, Foods you control are also Treasures in addition to their other types and have “{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.”

As Flowey enters, if you cast it, exile any number of permanents you control until Flowey leaves the battlefield.
Flowey has vigilance if there is a white card exiled with it. The same is true for blue and flying, black and lifelink, red and first strike, and green and trample. 
Flowey gets +1/+1 for each nonland card exiled with it.

Undying [i](When this creature dies, if it had no +1/+1 counters on it, return it to the battlefield under its owner's control with a +1/+1 counter on it.)[/i]
Sacrifice Undyne: Creatures you control gain indestructible and haste until end of turn.

Whenever you cast a spell, if it isn't the first spell you cast this turn and doesn't share a card type with the last spell you cast this turn, put a rating counter on Mettaton, then you may draw a card and discard a card.

Cleave {3}{R}{R} [i](You may cast this spell for its cleave cost. If you do, remove the words in square brackets.)[/i]

Partner [i](You can have two commanders if both have partner.)[/i]

[i]Snowgrave – [/i]If one or more stun counters would be put on a creature an opponent controls that already has two stun or more stun counters on it, instead exile that creature, and put a +1/+1 counter on Noelle.

Put the exiled cards on the bottom in a random order.)[/i]

Whenever another nontoken creature you control enters, create a Food token.

cards.rules_text: Whenever a creature you control dies, each opponent loses 3 life unless that player sacrifices a nonland permanent or discards a card. For each opponent that lost life this way, you gain 3 life.

Enchantments you control are Shards in addition to their other types with “{2}, Sacrifice this permanent: Scry 1, then draw a card.”
Whenever an enchantment you control leaves the battlefield, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control.

When another creature named Doctor W.D. Gaster leaves the battlefield, put a +1/+1 counter on Gaster and draw a card.
Put all non-Human creature cards with three creature cards from your graveyard onto the battlefield under your control.

Counter target spell. If the spell is countered this way, exile it with three time counters on it instead of putting it into its owner's graveyard. If it doesn't have suspend, it gains suspend. [i](At the beginning of its owner's upkeep, they remove a time counter. When the last is removed, they may play it without paying its mana cost. If it's a creature, it has haste.)[/i]

Create a Map token. [i](It's an artifact with “{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Target creature you control explores. Activate only as a sorcery.”)[/i]
Draw a card.

Enchant creature
Enchanted creature gets -0/-1.
At the beginning of the upkeep of enchanted creature's controller, that player loses 3 life unless they sacrifice that creature or discard a card.

Gift a card [i](You may promise an opponent a gift as you cast this spell. If you do, when it enters, they draw a card.)[/i]
When Santa Claus enters, if the gift was promised, he deals 4 damage to any target.
Exhaust – {1}{R}{G}{W}: Create two 1/1 white Elf creature tokens with haste. [i](Activate each exhaust ability only once.)[/i]

Flash
When Hatsune Miku enters, return target spell or nonland permanent to its owner's hand.
[+1]: Tap or untap target nonland permanent.
[0]: Draw a card, then discard a card.
[-6]: Gain control of target permanent.

cards.rules_text:
[i][i]Landfall[/i] – [/i]Whenever a land you control enters, create a tapped Treasure token.
{1}, Sacrifice another creature or artifact: Each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.
Exile target creature or planeswalker. If it had counters on it, put one of its counters on a permanent you control.

Lifelink
[i]Clair Obscur – [/i]{2}{W}{B}: Create an X/X white and black Elemental creature token, where X is the amount of life you've gained this turn. Activate only as a sorcery and only once each turn.

Inspired Eevee enters with a +1/+1 counter on it.
Whenever a creature you control dies, you may move a counter from it onto another target creature.

Whenever you put a counter on another creature you control, put a counter of the same kind on Noriaki Kakyoin. This ability triggers only once each turn.
{X}{G}, {T}: Create Hierophant Green, a legendary 0/0 green Spirit creature token with reach. Put X +1/+1 counters on it. Activate only as a sorcery.

Whenever this creature enters or you expend 4, create your choice of a Food token or a 1/1 green Plant creature token. [i](You expend 4 as you spend your fourth total mana to cast spells during a turn.)[/i]

Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, add {B}. Spend this mana only to activate an ability of a creature or artifact source you control.
{B}: This creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.

Enchant creature
Whenever enchanted creature attacks, it gains double strike until end of turn.
Blitz {1}{R} [i](If you cast this spell for its blitz cost, it gains haste and “When this permanent dies, draw a card”. Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step.)[/i]

When Dreamscape enters, shuffle any number of cards from your hand into your library, then draw that many cards.
{1}{U}, Sacrifice Dreamscape: Scry 1, then draw a card.

When this enchantment enters, exile up to one other target nonland permanent until this enchantment leaves the battlefield.
{7}{U}, Sacrifice Gone Fishin': Create Duke Fishron, a 10/10 legendary blue Fish creature token with flying and ward {2}.

Creatures you control get +1/+0.
Cascade [i](When you cast this spell, exile cards from the top of your library until you exile a nonland card that costs less. You may cast it without paying its mana cost. Put the exiled cards on the bottom in a random order.)[/i]

When AZ enters, if you cast it, you may destroy all other creatures. 
Exhaust – {X}{B}{B}: Return target creature card with mana value X from your graveyard to the battlefield with a finality counter on it. [i](Activate each exhaust ability only once.)[/i]
Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, create a 1/1 colorless Orb artifact creature token with flying and “This token can't block.”

Reach
When The Dragonborn enters, you may destroy target artifact, enchantment, or creature with flying. If you don't, look at the top four cards of your library. You may reveal a creature or land card from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom in any order.

Whenever Walking Wake attacks, discover 5. If you cast a creature spell this way, it enters tapped and attacking. [i](To discover 5, exile cards from the top of your library until you exile a nonland card with mana value 5 or less. Cast it without paying its mana cost or put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom in a random order.)[/i]

Other creatures you control are Food artifacts in addition to their other types and have “{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this permanent: You gain 3 life.”
Whenever you sacrifice a permanent, draw a card. This ability triggers only once each turn.

All creatures get -3/-3 until end of turn. 
Create a Mutagen token. [i](It's an artifact with “{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.”)[/i]

When Rarity enters, create a Royal role token attached to target creature you control. [i](If you control another Role on it, put that one into the graveyard. Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 and has ward {1}.)[/i]
2{W}W: Create a token that's a copy of target Aura you control. Activate only as a sorcery.

Web-slinging {W} [i](You may cast this spell for {W} if you also return a tapped creature you control to its owner's hand.)[/i]
Exile target creature. Its controller creates a 1/1 green Spider creature token with reach.

Prowess [i](Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.)[/i]
Claire has flying and lifelink as long as its power is 2 or more.

[i]Lemegeton[/i] – When Bethany enters, exile the top five cards of your library face down. You may look at them for as long as they remain exiled.
If you would draw a card, you may skip that draw instead. If you do, put a card exiled with Bethany into your hand and you lose 1 life.

When How to Train Your Dragon enters, create a 1/1 black Dragon creature token with flying.
Creatures you control have training. [i](Whenever a creature you control attacks with another creature with greater power, put a +1/+1 counter on the creature with lesser power.)[/i]

Soulbond [i](You may pair this creature with another unpaired creature when either enters. They remain paired for as long as you control both of them.)[/i]
As long as Mejiro Palmer is paired with another creature, each of those creatures has double strike and haste.
If a triggered ability of another legendary creature you control triggers, that ability triggers an additional time.

Protection from tokens
[i]Hole Punch – [/i]When The Child enters, destroy target creature. If that creature dies this way, its controller creates two tokens that are copies of that creature, except their power is half that creature's power and their toughness is half that creature's toughness. Round up each time.

Undying [i](When Yharon dies, if it had no +1/+1 counters on it, return it to the battlefield under its owner's control with a +1/+1 counter on it.)[/i]
If a source you control would deal damage to an opponent or a permanent an opponent controls, it deals that much damage plus Yharon's power instead.

Whenever Walter White becomes tapped, you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card.
Whenever you discard a card, crystallize. This ability triggers only once each turn. [i](Put a +1/+1 counter on a creature you control or create a Treasure.)[/i]

Zooble enters with three +1/+1 counters, a reach counter, a trample counter and a vigilance counter on it.
At the beginning of combat on your turn, you may move a counter from Zooble onto another creature.

{T}: Choose a card name that hasn't been chosen from among Ajani's Pridemate, Snapcaster Mage, Dark Confidant, Young Pyromancer and Tarmogoyf. Create a copy of the card with the chosen name. You may cast the copy without paying its mana cost.

Suspect up to one target creature. [i](A suspected creature has menace and can't block.)[/i]
Draw a card.

Time loop [i](As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Remove them all after III.)[/i]
I – Create a 1/1 blue Doctor creature token.
II – You may discard a card. If you do, draw a card.
III – Heaven Sent deals 1 damage to target opponent. [i](Then do it again.)[/i]

Menace
Other creatures you control that share a creature type with Jacket have menace.
Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Then move all +1/+1 counters on that creature to up to one other target creature. If one or more +1/+1 counters are moved this way, you gain that much life.

Cascade. If you cast a spell this way, it gains deathtouch and lifelink. [i](When you cast this spell, exile cards from the top of your library until you exile a nonland card that costs less. You may cast it without paying its mana cost. Put the exiled cards on the bottom in a random order.)[/i]
